from pymilvus import FieldOp, MilvusClient

client = MilvusClient(
    uri="http://localhost:19530",
    token="root:Milvus"
)

client.upsert(
    collection_name="users",
    data=[{"pk": 1, "tags": ["premium"]}],
    # highlight-next-line
    field_ops={"tags": FieldOp.array_append()},
)
from pymilvus import FieldOp, MilvusClient

client = MilvusClient(
    uri="http://localhost:19530",
    token="root:Milvus"
)

client.upsert(
    collection_name="users",
    data=[{"pk": 1, "tags": ["trial"]}],
    # highlight-next-line
    field_ops={"tags": FieldOp.array_remove()},
)
